The Woman Behind the Magic

Pondy Kago Tumedi — Fashion Revolutionary

Founder & CEO of Pixie's Plug Makeup Studio, Pondy has always embraced creativity, artistry, and beauty to empower women. She believes makeup transforms not just appearance — but confidence, identity, and joy.

Starting in April 2021, she has built a nationally recognised brand, been featured twice in The Midweek Sun, and amassed a loyal following of clients who keep coming back.

"A Fashion Revolution in Every Stitch."
Book with Pondy

The Clothing Edit

Style That Speaks

Pixie's Plug isn't just a makeup studio — it's a full lifestyle brand. Our curated clothing collection brings style, confidence and quality together. Real pieces, real women, real Botswana.

Book Now

Deposit & Cancellation

  • 50% deposit required to secure your booking
  • Deposit must be paid immediately upon booking
  • Deposit is non-refundable
  • Balance payable on the day of appointment

Transport & Travel

  • Transport & accommodation covered by client
  • Fuel for entire trip is client's responsibility
  • Mileage rate: P7 per km (return trip)
  • Express charge of P150 applies outside working hours
